summary: Source fidelity is acceptable for this extraction refresh. PubMed EFetch and ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 snapshots identify the article, trial registration, posted results modules, content types, retrieval URLs, and content hashes.

findings.claim_or_issue: The extraction uses source snapshots for PMID 38956196 and NCT04313634.
findings.why_it_matters: Source snapshots make metadata and posted-result extraction reproducible enough for audit.
findings.recommended_action: Keep snapshots stable; later importer scripts can regenerate and compare hashes.
